name: rtb-gis-schools-monitoring-system
description: RTB GIS Schools Monitoring & Intelligence System

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix file-server install && npm --prefix map-viewer install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:file-server" "npm run dev:map-viewer"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:file-server" "npm run dev:map-viewer"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
